persona.subject: Elevating Your Brand Together
persona.bio: a Miami lifestyle and fashion content creator who has a Bengal cat
persona.intro: My name is Sabina Ruzmetov and I am a content creator based in Miami, Florida. I create lifestyle and fashion content and love featuring my Bengal cat in my work.
persona.cta:
I would love the opportunity to create high-quality content for your brand through carousels, reels, stories, and UGC posts. I am happy to discuss whatever would work best for your brand and align with your values.

If a collaboration is not available right now, I would love to be added to your PR list.
persona.signature:
Instagram and TikTok: @sabina.ruz
Portfolio: https://ugcsabina.my.canva.site/ugc

Looking forward to hearing from you,
Sabina
